documentation:
RPP unit contains only one main meter, monitoring both Panel 1 and Panel 2.
Read the second meter module in the RPP Panel for the first 42 Circuits (CT's 1-42) - devicePanel2.
Read the first meter module in the RPP Panel for the last 42 Circuits (CT's 43-84) - devicePanel1.
name: SqD_NFBCPMP_84ckt_Modbus_v3
